title: Somersham Wellington Memorial
crew_summary: Crew bailed out; 11 civilians killed (including children) when aircraft crashed into houses

external_narratives.summary: War Memorials Online listing for the memorial plaque to those killed in the crash of 156 Squadron Wellington X3811. Records the plaque commemorating the 11 civilian casualties of the crash.

Photographic record of the memorial plaque to eleven Somersham civilians killed when Wellington X3811 crashed into cottages next to Whitehall in October 1942. The crew bailed out safely but the uncontrolled aircraft struck residential buildings.
key_details: Crashed into cottages next to Whitehall
Crew bailed out safely before crash
Bad weather and severe icing caused crew to lose control

external_narratives.summary: Photograph of Whitehall, Somersham, now a school, which narrowly escaped destruction when the Wellington crashed into adjacent cottages. Provides visual context of the crash site location.
key_details: Building now used as a school

local_contacts.role: Local authority responsible for memorial upkeep
